query:
-- Update videoUrl to direct public S3 URL for all orders that have a videoKey
UPDATE orders
SET videoUrl = CONCAT('https://kidzrstarz-upload.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/', videoKey)
WHERE videoKey IS NOT NULL AND videoKey != '';

-- Verify the update
SELECT id, childName, videoKey, videoUrl
FROM orders
WHERE videoKey IS NOT NULL AND videoKey != ''
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
